# safegit hook

manage pre-pre-push hooks

## hook install

install a hook from a file

### Arguments

| Name | Required | Description |
|------|----------|-------------|
| `path` | yes | path to hook script |

## hook list

list installed hooks

## hook run

run hooks

### Arguments

| Name | Required | Description |
|------|----------|-------------|
| `name` | no | hook name to run |
